rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved the task objective. It deployed a 3-node Elasticsearch cluster using only native Kubernetes resources (no operators/CRDs), created the required Service named `es-http` on port 9200 with HTTPS, all 3 pods reached Ready state, and the agent verified read/write success and GREEN cluster health. The primary oracle returned pass. The regression sweep shows stage_01 failing with 'found 5 pods' but this is an artifact of stage_02 having added 2 more pods (es-data-new StatefulSet) by the time the sweep ran — not a defect in stage_01's work. The agent's 4 mutations (ConfigMap, headless Service, ClusterIP Service, StatefulSet) are exactly the right minimal set of resources needed.
